name: Track student attendance from CSV, alert parents by email, and generate an HTML dashboard

parameters.content:
## How it works

1. Runs every weekday at 17:30 (Mon–Fri)
2. Reads `student_attendance.csv` and filters to today's records only
3. Splits students into Absent / Present branches
4. Fetches parent contacts from `student_contacts.csv` and merges the data
5. Calculates risk level, attendance %, consecutive streak, and trend
6. Sends a colour-coded HTML email alert to parents of absent students via SMTP
7. Builds and saves an interactive `dashboard.html` with 5 tabs: Today, Weekly, Monthly, Full History, At-Risk
8. Appends today's records to `attendance_report.csv` for historical tracking

## Setup steps

1. Upload `student_attendance.csv` to the n8n files folder
2. Upload `student_contacts.csv` to the n8n files folder
3. Create an empty `attendance_report.csv` in the n8n files folder
4. Add `smtp_user` in n8n → Settings → Variables
5. Configure SMTP credentials in the **Send Email** node
6. Adjust the cron schedule if needed (default: 17:30 Mon–Fri)

## Trigger & data ingestion

Schedule trigger reads attendance CSV and filters to today's records only.

## Absence routing & contact merge

Splits absent vs present students, fetches parent contacts, and merges records.

## Alert logic

Calculates risk level, attendance %, streak, and trend per student.

## Parent notifications

Generates and sends a colour-coded HTML email alert to parents via SMTP.

## No absences branch

Skips email and dashboard when all students are present today.

nodes.name: Build Visual Report and Update Attendance File

parameters.content:
## Dashboard & report update

Builds interactive HTML dashboard and appends today's records to attendance history CSV.

main.node: Build Visual Report and Update Attendance File
